description: Persona intake form — collected after login, before payment. Drives item bank selection and LLM report personalization.

fields.label: What best describes you right now?
fields.note: This field determines which RIASEC item bank to serve.

fields.label: What is your primary field or area of study/work?
fields.note: Used in LLM prompt for domain-aware career suggestions.

fields.label: What is your specialization or job title?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Computer Science, Data Analyst, Mechanical Engineering
fields.note: Free text — gives the LLM specific context for career direction mapping.

fields.label: What are you hoping to achieve in the next 2-3 years?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Switch to data science, get promoted to manager, start a business
fields.note: Key LLM grounding field — report compares scores against stated goals.

fields.label: How satisfied are you with your current career direction?
fields.note: Low satisfaction + mismatched RIASEC = strong signal for career pivot suggestion.

fields.label: What's your biggest career challenge right now?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Not sure which direction to go, feel stuck in current role
fields.note: Used in LLM friction-points and next-steps sections.

fields.label: Highest education completed
fields.note: Context for norm group selection and LLM career-level framing.

fields.label: Which work environment appeals to you more?
fields.note: Shapes career-direction suggestions in the LLM report.
